message:
fix: check positional arg before flag validation in mail reply (gt-m7z0x)

runMailReply checked mailReplyMessage=="" before examining positional args,
causing "gt mail reply msg-123 'My reply'" to fail with "required flag
message not set" even though the message body was provided as a positional
arg. Removed the premature flag check so the existing positional-arg-or-flag
logic and final validation handle all cases correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
